title: CLINICAL AND ECONOMIC ANALYSIS AND ITS POSSIBILITIES IN THE EVALUATION OF THE USE OF ANTIBACTERIAL DRUGS
author: Mavlyanova Nozima Tokhirjonovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A retrospective clinical and economic analysis was carried out in two departments of the TashPMI clinic to study the frequency of prescribing antibacterial drugs using the ABC analysis method. The data of bacteriological seeding of these patients for sensitivity were analyzed and the quantitative composition of pathogens in pathologies of the respiratory tract in children under 5 years of age was studied.
steps_raw: A retrospective clinical and economic analysis was carried out in two departments of the TashPMI clinic to study the frequency of prescribing antibacterial drugs using the ABC analysis method. The data of bacteriological seeding of these patients for sensitivity were analyzed and the quantitative composition of pathogens in pathologies of the respiratory tract in children under 5 years of age was studied.
keywords: antibacterial drugs, children's diseases, abc analysis, microbes
